Off Calendar Mar-19-2020 Continued To Apr-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-23-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EXTRON CO.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

OFF CALENDAR pursuant to stipulation. The motion is to be re-set before Judge Jackson.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF B.B.S.' Motion To Seal Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint.

GRANTED. No opposition filed, and an order temporarily sealing portions of the Complaint is appropriate to preserve the right of Defendant Prelude Fertility, Inc. to seek a sealing order pursuant to Rules 2.550 and 2.551 of the California Rules of Court. The Court will sign the proposed order provided with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, not Reported. =(302/EPS)
